zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de la Haye II於1185年出生在英國林可爾史爾布維爾時，他的父親Ralph de la Haye I20歲，母親Sarah Burwell20歲。他於大約1221年與Eustache de Trian結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年6月在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.Burwell, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布維爾

zh-hans.Arlington, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可阿爾林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de la Haye II于1185年出生在英国林可爾史爾布維爾时，他的父亲Ralph de la Haye I20岁，母亲Sarah Burwell20岁。他于大约1221年与Eustache de Trian结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1254年6月在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de la Haye II was born in 1185, in Burwell, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Ralph de la Haye I, was 20 and his mother, Sarah Burwell, was 20. He married Eustache de Trian about 1221. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in June 1254, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de la Haye II est né en 1185, à Burwell, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de la Haye I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Burwell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eustache de Trian environ 1221. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1254, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de la Haye II 1185 in Burwell, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de la Haye I 20 und seine Mutter Sarah Burwell 20. Er hat um 1221 Eustache de Trian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1254 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de la Haye II è nato il nel 1185 nel Burwell, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de la Haye I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Burwell, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eustache de Trian circa 1221. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1254, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de la Haye IIが1185年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルウエルで生まれた時，父Ralph de la Haye Iは20歳，母Sarah Burwellは20歳であった。約1221年にEustache de Trianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年6月に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de la Haye II(이)가 1185년 영국 링코실르 버웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de la Haye I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Burwell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1221년 Eustache de Trian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 6월 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de la Haye II nasceu em 1185, em Burwell, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de la Haye I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Burwell, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eustache de Trian aproximadamente 1221. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1254, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de la Haye II родился в 1185 г. в местности бурвелл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de la Haye I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Burwell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustache de Trian около 1221 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер июнь 1254 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de la Haye II nació en 1185, en Burwell, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de la Haye I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sarah Burwell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eustache de Trian aproximadamente 1221. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en junio de 1254, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
